title: Atomic Settings
description: Configuration file for the Atomic CLI (@bastani/atomic). Stored at ~/.atomic/settings.json (global) or .atomic/settings.json (project-local).

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor intellisense.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last configuration update.

trustedPaths.description: Globally trusted workspaces that have completed provider onboarding through 'atomic init'.

workspacePath.description: Absolute path to the initialized workspace.

provider.description: Provider initialized for the trusted workspace.

providers.description: Per-provider overrides for chatFlags and envVars. chatFlags replaces built-in defaults entirely when set; envVars are merged on top of defaults (user values win on conflict). Local .atomic/settings.json takes precedence over global ~/.atomic/settings.json.

providerOverrides.description: Override settings for a single provider.

chatFlags.description: CLI flags that replace the provider's default chat flags entirely when set.

envVars.description: Environment variables merged on top of the provider's defaults (user values win on conflict).
